patterns.name: LLM Key in Client Code
patterns.description: LLM API key found in client-side code — anyone can extract it from the browser

patterns.name: Unsanitized User Input to LLM
patterns.description: User input passed directly to LLM call without sanitization — vulnerable to prompt injection

patterns.name: Unsanitized LLM Call Pattern
patterns.description: User input flows into LLM API call — vulnerable to prompt injection attacks

patterns.name: System Prompt in Code
patterns.description: System prompt hardcoded in source — could be leaked via prompt injection or repo exposure

patterns.name: Prompt Template File
patterns.description: Prompt template file found in repo — system prompts can be extracted if repo is public

patterns.name: AI Route Without Validation
patterns.description: AI endpoint detected — verify input validation is applied to prevent abuse
